brief: Market / Portal feature post for VOIDBORN — "Chase the Apex". Hunt foils, epics, and signature prints—the kind of pull that rewrites a deck overnight and makes opponents pause on turn one. Explain hunting foils, epics, and chase prints that rewrite a deck overnight. In-game credits economy (no real-money P2P). Instagram hype + link in bio; Facebook walkthrough; Discord steps + https://voidborn.fun.

image.prompt: Cinematic close-up of a glowing, legendary trading card floating in the air, swirling elemental energy of fire and void in the background, sharp focus, hyper-detailed, dark fantasy atmosphere, ethereal lighting, no text.
